SimJesse! 1.0
 

SimJesse! 1.0

“Run, Jesse, Run!”

© 1993 by Mark Hayes (ccmlh@it.bu.edu)
Freeware. Please distribute!
Dedicated to Captain Crunch,
the Multicultural Caffeinated Cockatiel.

Web re-creation, 2026. Every sound is extracted from the original Macintosh app's resource fork: all 123 clips, converted from classic Mac 'snd ' resources. The portrait and backdrop are recovered from the original PICT art. The clips are strung together in random, grammar-aware order, just like the original, and it runs continuously until you hit Stop.
